name: Meditative
description: you could fall asleep to it

name: Chill
description: you could still fall asleep to it, but there's some sort of rhythm

name: Laid-back
description: you wouldn't sleep to this, but soft rhythms/percussion

name: Vibin
description: soft, but exciting rhythms, making you wish for more

name: Lively
description: proper (brain) dancing song, past the warm-up

name: Agile
description: this really makes your body/brain move

name: Intense
description: hard and fast, almost too much in a way (in hardness/pace/scariness)

name: Reckless
description: (almost) disturbingly intense, too much in a way

name: Airy
description: full of high/treble frequencies (kill mid and low to hear)

name: LOFI
description: intentionally downgraded high-frequency response

name: Hissy
description: static high-frequency noise is present in the mix

name: Bright
description: significant amount of mid (esp. in chorus/drop) (kill high & low to hear an unbalance)

name: Dark
description: lack of mid (the opposite of Bright, mid doesn't add as much to the master)

name: Warm
description: significant amount of mid-bass (esp. in chorus/drop) -- 250-500 in Audacity

name: Boomy
description: significant amount of fast-release low-bass (esp. in chorus/drop) -- <140hz in Audacity

name: Rumbling
description: significant amount of slow-release low-bass (constant bass) -- <140hz in Audacity

name: Muddy
description: low frequencies dominate, (almost) overpowering the whole mix

name: Punchy
description: uniquely powerful kick/drums

name: Bouncy
description: fast, dynamic kicks/bass/etc. with a bit of 'boing'

name: Wavy
description: describes bass heavy but relaxed beats with synthetisers (e.g. Max B - I'm So High)

name: CrunchyBass
description: when the bass has mid/high extension, usual in Dubstep and DnB e.g.

name: WalkingBass
description: when the bass is changing notes a lot

name: DroneBass
description: the bassline doesn't move much/at all, and is sustained throughout the whole track/break

name: LeadBass
description: the bassline carries the main melodic role of the track

name: Dynamic
description: has periods with various volume levels (dynamic range)

name: Sparse
description: for the most part, the track is quiet, with few to no breaks

name: Dense
description: for the most part, the track is loud, with few to no breakdowns

name: Vintage
description: sounding not like a modern master

name: Trashy
description: sounding like the recorders didn't put much money/time into making the record, sometimes intentionally

name: Crisp
description: especially clean and distinguishable samples

name: Sweeping
description: resembling a low-to-high or vice versa wave of sound, which is pronounced

name: Ethereal
description: the song has sections with long synth notes creating a sense of deep atmosphere (without much percussion)

name: Pulsing
description: something resembles a (heart) pulse in the track

name: Beats
description: less melody and (can/could be) used to rap over

name: Melodic
description: has a defined melody-oriented part

name: Ornate
description: has a really decorated melody with many notes and high complexity

name: Chord-progression
description: the melody is played for a long time, and it evolves gradually in notes

name: Arpeggio
description: when the chords are played in an up-and-down cycle (this might or might not be a part of a chord-progression)

name: Progressive
description: for the most part, the song is progressing towards a climax, which might not even be reached

name: Dramatic
description: song has dramatic/epic sections

name: Anthem
description: has a dramatic breakdown / build-up

name: Explosive
description: the chorus/drop/etc. comes in a surprising and sudden way

name: Suspenseful
description: song has intense part(s) making you feel excited because you're unsure how it will turn out (on first listening at least)

name: Tense
description: the suspense is sustained throughout the song

name: Minimalistic
description: doesn't have many sound elements and layers

name: Repetitive
description: a/some section(s) are noticeably repeated with little variation throughout the song

name: Abstract
description: has many different unique/unusual sound elements and layers

name: Extensive
description: has many different sound elements and layers, but not in an unusual way

name: Broken
description: when the arrangement sounds (almost) amusical

name: Beat-intro
description: the song has an intro, which contains beats/percussion

name: Beatless-intro
description: the song has an intro with no beats/percussion

name: No-intro
description: the song doesn't have an intro, it's straight to the point

name: OnTheOne
description: can be played just by hitting start and everyone goes crazy (recognisable hit)

name: Beat-outro
description: the song has an outro, which contains beats/percussion

name: Beatless-outro
description: the song has an outro with no beats/percussion

name: No-outro
description: the song doesn't have an outro, it's just cut off suddenly

name: Fadeout
description: the song doesn't actually end, more like the volume just get faded down

name: Reverb-out
description: the song ends by the reverberance of the last sounds

name: Chorus-chorus
description: the song has (at least 1) 'chorus' which can be used for phrasing

name: Drop-drop
description: the song has (at least 1) 'drop' which can be used for phrasing

name: Breaks
description: has no breakdowns, the beat is almost always present, but usually varied in different phrases

name: Uniquely-phrased
description: the song's phrasing is unique

name: Varied2nd
description: the 2nd (or subsequent) chorus/drop is different to the 1st one

name: One-piece
description: can only be played wholly or aggro-cutted

name: LongBreakdown
description: the mid-song breakdown is lengthy (or at least 1 of them is)

name: LongBuildup
description: the mid-song buildup is lengthy (or at least 1 of them is)

name: Bridge
description: has a bridge section (a contrasting section before the 2nd drop/chorus)

name: VariableBPM
description: the tempo changes mid-song at least at one point

name: FMBass
description: sounds like electric bass guitar, resembles metallic timbre

name: MoogyBass
description: the bass you would typically hear in GFunk (created using Minimoog) - lower and more stable than TwistyBass

name: OctaveBass
description: bass that's heard a lot in 80s Synth Pop, it's between FMBass and MoogyBass

name: StabbyBass
description: imagine slowed-down trap with hi-hats replaced with bass... popular in Synthwave

name: MoroderBass
description: a special Stabby x Octave bass, made with old-school synthesizers and reverb, with a funky/groovy sound characteristic

name: 808Bass
description: a very fast very low bass sound popular in modern Hip hop

name: PluckyBass
description: a synth-like bass note that is quick and comes in bunches, often Bouncy, acts also as LEAD

name: TwistyBass
description: PluckyBass, but has resonance at the end, it's like the Acid sound, but for bass

name: SubBass
description: (usually long sustained) constant, very deep and clean (sinus wave) bass sound -- the <70Hz range is prominent in the song

name: ReesyBass
description: long sustained sawtooth bass, Synthier than GrindyBass

name: WobbleBass
description: aggressively frequency cut (and potentially resonated) sub bass, common in Dubstep, DNB, etc.

name: GlitchBass
description: crushed/8-bit/distorted (sub)bass, common in Glitch Hop, IBM, Dubstep, etc.

name: GrindyBass
description: the heavily distorted bass 'pipe' sound, common in DNB, Dubstep, etc.

name: PortamentoBass
description: similar to the previous basses, but glides up and down (booing continuously - not in notes, unlike WalkingBass)

name: RollingBass
description: similar to the previous basses, but continuously moves back and forth in frequency/pitch (like a spring), also called as 'Roller'

name: DubBass
description: sparse but intense bass punches, usually with a lot of reverb

name: BrassyBass
description: bass, which sounds like it's made with a tuned and/or electronically modified brass instrument (e.g. trumpet)

name: Overdriven
description: sounds overdriven, but doesn't crack or clip

name: Distorted
description: sounds overdriven, sometimes even cracking and clipping

name: Glitchy
description: intended slips in the record

name: Scratchy
description: song contains Vinyl scratching

name: Cutty
description: song has abrupt volume cuts (e.g. Snow Strippers - Depriving You)

name: BeatRoll
description: song has parts produced where it simulates the Roll DJ effect (e.g. Snow Strippers - Lacerate)

name: Buzzy
description: a 'Grindy' mid/high sound

name: Acid
description: the widely popular electric 'boing' sound

name: Tremolo
description: a type of short echo added to instruments, mostly guitars, see: https://youtu.be/ww1EgV9q-0U?si=Wr3ELmxHKFGBzJnl&t=189

name: Vibrato
description: similar to Tremolo, but instead of the volume, the pitch is modulated, see: https://youtu.be/YKtfN4ZzoLY?si=o_zBjeQty1_UXQKN&t=63

name: Reverb
description: sounds like it's in a large room

name: Spacious
description: naturally provides a big sound stage, 'feels wide and 3D', with or without reverb

name: Detuned
description: sounds like some instruments are (intentionally) out of tune, common in Grunge, Goth, etc. styles

name: Pan
description: utilising the left and right channel in a distinguished way

name: Chipmunk
description: has an 8bit, game machine, etc. sound characteristic

name: Dry
description: without much sounds effects / natural (e.g. acoustic)

name: Pads
description: has noticable ambience creating space fillers, usually slowly fading-in and out with long sustain

name: Synth
description: song has a noticable electronic synthesisers

name: Piano
description: sounds like piano

name: Organ
description: sounds like organ (big 'piano' in temples e.g.)

name: Whistly
description: sounds like whistling

name: Fluty
description: sounds like flute, oboe, etc. (woodwinds)

name: Brassy
description: sounds like trumpet, saxophone, etc. (made of brass)

name: Horns
description: sounds like horn (e.g. siren), non-brass

name: Stringy
description: sounds like violin, cello, etc. (but not guitar!)

name: Harpy
description: sounds like harps or guitars played gently and harmonically

name: Banjo
description: sounds like a banjo (shorter and out-of-tune decay comp. to guitar, often in country music)

name: AcousticGuitar
description: sounds like acoustic guitar (much higher and longer resonance comp. to banjo)

name: ElectricGuitar
description: sounds like electric guitar

name: BassGuitar
description: sounds like bass guitar

name: GuitarSolo
description: song has a big guitar solo

name: Percussion
description: song has percussion

name: Semi-percussion
description: song has some percussion, but it's not much

name: No-percussion
description: song has no percussion (e.g. only synths and bass)

name: Drummy
description: sounds like ACOUSTIC drums (not JUST electronic, in can be in Electronic Music, like Jungle)

name: Kicky
description: sounds like drum kicks (either electronic or acoustic)

name: DoublePedal
description: sounds like a drummer is using both of their legs to kick drums

name: Snary
description: sounds like drum snares (either electronic or acoustic)

name: Clappy
description: sounds like clapping (either electronic or acoustic)

name: Snappy
description: sounds like snapping fingers

name: Hi-hatty
description: sounds like drum hi-hats (either electronic or acoustic)

name: Congas
description: sounds like a 'tribal' hand hit drum

name: Cowbell
description: sounds like a metallic hi-hat/snare with a bell-like decay

name: Plucky
description: sounds like a xylophone

name: Orchestra
description: many acoustic instruments played together

name: Tolling
description: sounds like huge bells or other deep clanging big instruments

name: Tinkling
description: sounds like (little) bells or similar ringing instruments

name: Whooshy
description: sounds like a 'woosh' windy sound

name: Maracas
description: Rumbatok in Hungarian

name: Tambourine
description: another shake instrument, many jingle like sounds together (accompanied hand snare sometimes)

name: Accordion
description: Harmonika in Hungarian

name: JawHarp
description: Dorong in Hungarian

name: Instrumental
description: song has no vocals

name: Semi-instrumental
description: song has negligible amount of vocals

name: Vox
description: song has vocals

name: Acapella
description: only vocals

name: SoloVox
description: sung by one solo vocalist (for the most part)

name: Feat
description: sung by multiple singers, but not interchangeably (for the most part)

name: Duet+
description: contains at least one section where two (or more) singers sing interchangeably

name: Choir
description: contains at least one section where many people sing together

name: Canon
description: contains at least one section where vocals are played at the same time with different amounts of delay

name: Layered
description: multiple vocals are layered together (noticeably at some point in the song)

name: Auto-tuney
description: the vocals are noticeably pitch-corrected

name: Choppy
description: the vocals are digitally cut and maybe even reordered

name: Transed
description: when the vocal is stopped at regular intervals, making it stuttery (example: B3000-badthiings)

name: Vocoded
description: vocals are distorted in a way they sound machine/robot/electro like (e.g. Daft Punk)

name: Pristine
description: vocals are natural sounding, as if they weren't digitally altered by effects

name: Masculine
description: male (sounding) vocals

name: Feminine
description: female (sounding) vocals

name: Pitched-up
description: altered vocals by pitching up

name: Pitched-down
description: altered vocals by pitching down

name: Fiery
description: incredibly strong voice that empowers the whole song (example: Adele - Hello)

name: Silky
description: high/medium-pitch, esp. GENTLE, SOFT to the ears

name: High-pitched
description: especially high vocals (naturally or pitch shift)

name: Soaring
description: high-pitch rough, common in Metal bands

name: Silvery
description: high-pitch smooth

name: Raspy
description: medium-pitch rough

name: Mellow
description: medium-pitch smooth

name: Gravelly
description: deep rough, 'smoker's voice'

name: Velvety
description: deep smooth

name: Muted
description: vocals are quiet, almost hard to hear

name: Whispery
description: like whispering

name: Hummy
description: vocals contain humming

name: Scat
description: song contains vocals, which try to imitate and serve as instruments (e.g. dab-ba-du-du-du-ba)

name: Mumbly
description: usually in modern hip-hop, instead of rapping

name: Spoken
description: regular speaking

name: Rappy
description: rap vocals

name: Catchy
description: easily remembered and recalled

name: Chanty
description: vocals are like a chant (e.g. Run DMC)

name: Lullaby
description: quiet, gentle singing

name: Singy
description: normal, 'easily consumed', nice singing

name: Lofty
description: elated, concentrated singing

name: Edgy
description: singer makes drastic changes in intensity/pitch, but doesn't shout or scream (much)

name: Shouty
description: shouting or otherwise aggressive vocals

name: Screechy
description: high-pitched shouting that sounds like screaming (e.g. Alice Glass)

name: Screamy
description: song contains screams

name: Wobbly
description: weak and constantly varying in pitch, usually because of emotions

name: Undecipherable
description: song contains vocals, which are impossible to decipher

name: Lyrical
description: song has meaningful/creative/witty lyrics

name: Poetic
description: song has lyrics that resemble poetry instead of pop music

name: Philosophical
description: the lyrics are thought-provoking and deal with complex abstract topics

name: Provocative
description: the lyrics deliberately evoke strong reactions from the listener

name: Rhapsodic
description: the lyrics contain unrestrained emotions from the singer

name: Elegiac
description: the tone of the lyrics is resentful/melancholic/sorrowful/etc.

name: Sentimental
description: the tone of the lyrics is human and emotionally intimate, can overlap with  'Elegiac', 'Sentimental', etc.

name: Confessional
description: expresses feelings not expressed before in front of somebody

name: Imagistic
description: the lyrics evoke vivid images (positives or negatives), either directly or indirectly (using metaphors, allusions, etc.)

name: Symbolic
description: the lyrics make use of symbols, representing deeper meaning beyond what's literal

name: Enigmatic
description: the meaning of the lyrics cannot be fully understood

name: Free-form
description: the lyrics are unstructured

name: Ironic
description: the opposite thing happens of what's expected

name: Sarcastic
description: expresses the opposite of what it means

name: Satirical
description: makes fun of sb/sth by exaggerating their negatives

name: Dissy
description: directly making fun of sb/sth

name: Cynical
description: the tone is sceptical/distrustful, often with a tone of sarcasm and pessimism

name: Biographical
description: the lyrics are about somebody's life

name: Narrative
description: the lyrics tell a story

name: Retrospective
description: the lyrics recall a past experience

name: Dialogue
description: the lyrics contain dialogues

name: Non-explicit
description: does not contain any swear words

name: Explicit
description: contains swear words and/or adult themes (not suited for children), but within 'good taste'

name: Vulgar
description: has a high concentration of profanity, not within 'good taste'

name: Outrageous
description: incredibly profane and nefarious lyrics

name: Morbid
description: the lyrics are too interested in unpleasant subjects, especially death

name: Humorous
description: the lyrics can make you laugh

name: WordPlay
description: the lyrics use witty wordplays

name: Swingy
description: gives Swing vibes (easy flowing instrumental rhythms, short and long notes interchangeably in the bar)

name: Groovy
description: danceable song with syncopation (some drum elements off-grid INSIDE EACH BAR, also often sth extra at 4th and/or 8th note)

name: Funky
description: groovy, but snares are off-beat and intricately placed

name: Jazzy
description: groovy, packed with instruments, but chill and slower tempo

name: Techy
description: gives mechanical/technology/synthetic vibes

name: Housey
description: has classic House synths/pianos

name: Trancey
description: has elements usual in Trance music (e.g. hypnotic synths)

name: Grungy
description: sounds distortion-filled, detuned, riff-based (with possibly rough vocals)

name: Punky
description: fits 'Punk' culture (rebelling, rough, guitars etc.)

name: Emoy
description: fits 'Emo' culture (detachment, introspective emotion expression, etc.)

name: Gothy
description: fits 'Goth' culture (dark colours, morbidity, haunting vibes, etc.)

name: Hippiey
description: fits 'Hippie' culture (colourful style, trippy, open-mindedness, spiritual liberty, etc.)

name: Gangsta
description: gives gang/criminal vibes

name: Afro
description: gives the vibes of the African(-American) culture

name: Arabic
description: gives the vibes of the Arabic culture

name: Asian
description: gives the vibes of Asian cultures (e.g. Korean, Japanese, Chinese, etc.)

name: Latin
description: gives the vibes of Latin cultures (e.g. Spanish, Mexican, etc.)

name: Tropical
description: gives tropical vibes

name: Foreground
description: the song is too distracting for doing activities other than active dancing / music-listening

name: Background-music
description: the song isn't ambient, but it doesn't attract deep concentration, so it can be used as BG music for any general activity

name: Ambience
description: sounds as if it could be the background noise to some non-dancing activity

name: Atmospheric
description: the music itself contains background noises as if it's played in an environment

name: Fun
description: while having fun in a social/physical activity, this song could fit the background

name: Pure
description: music for its own sake, no explicit narrative/story/etc. tried to be conveyed

name: Expressive
description: effectively conveying a feeling/topic/theme

name: Impressionist
description: the song expresses something that's in the moment, and you can immerse yourself in what's captured

name: Reflective
description: in reaction to the music you or the singer contemplate/describe their own (past) actions/feelings/etc.

name: Theatrical
description: music which could fit scenes in films or theatrical performances

name: Artistic
description: the song can be considered (fine) art

name: Stimulating
description: providing great sensory pleasure

name: Trippy
description: provides an audio-visionary experience as if you were under the influence of drugs

name: Hypnotic
description: if you concentrate to it, it can make your brain go funny

name: Euphoric
description: something about the song is euphoric: it gives a mental orgasm like experience

name: Aesthetic
description: makes you contemplate something that's visually pleasing

name: Idyllic
description: makes you contemplate a perfect or unrealistically beautiful scene or situation

name: Dissociation
description: if you concentrate to it, you get transported to another world, and you forget a bit about your own reality

name: Dreamy
description: gives a dreamlike listening experience

name: FeverDream
description: gives an unreal, bizarre dreamlike listening experience, which might be bad or delirious

name: Spiritual
description: resonates deep feelings/beliefs, often in supernatural/religious context

name: Lush
description: gives flora/greenhouse/jungle/etc. vibes

name: Fluid
description: gives aquatic/flowing/waving/etc. vibes

name: Barren
description: gives desert/empty warehouse/ghost town/etc. vibes

name: Vivid
description: gives colourful/rich/positive/etc. vibes

name: Sterile
description: doesn't convey substantial emotions

name: Emotional
description: conveys substantial emotions

name: Emotionally-heavy
description: heavily emotional

name: Happy
description: based on the sound and overall vibe, it's happy

name: Sad
description: based on the sound and overall vibe, it's sad

name: Sombre
description: based on the sound and overall vibe, it's a bit downcast and muted, but not outright sad

name: Ambivalent
description: based on the sound and overall vibe, it's both happy and sad

name: Gloomy
description: based on the sound and overall vibe, it's gloomy (darker than sadder)

name: Bleak
description: based on the sound and overall vibe, it's bleak (dark, dull, NOT SAD but neutral)

name: Eerie
description: based on the sound and overall vibe, it's haunting (scarier & darker than sadder)

name: Scary
description: based on the sound and overall vibe, it's scary (just scary, NOT SAD but neutral)

name: Spooky
description: based on the sound and overall vibe, it's spooky (imitating scariness in a fun way)

name: Uncanny
description: makes you feel like something isn't quite right in a scary way

name: Ominous
description: makes you feel like as if something bad is about to happen (either through lyrics or the instrumental)

name: Introspective
description: makes you feel introverted emotions mainly

name: Extrospective
description: makes you feel extroverted emotions mainly

name: Mysterious
description: something about the song is mysterious/unknown/makes you wonder/etc.

name: Magical
description: something about the song makes you think of magic

name: Surreal
description: something about the song breaks the feeling of reality in a subtle way

name: Bizarre
description: something about the song throws you off completely, it's so unexpectedly weird

name: Weird
description: something about the song is weird, without being funny/silly/etc., just straight weird

name: Silly
description: something about the song is silly: no longer goofy, just overly eccentric/foolish

name: Goofy
description: something about the song is goofy/harmlessly foolish/eccentric/quirky/etc.

name: Cozy
description: something about the song is comforting/gives you warmth

name: Cute
description: something about the song is cute/wholesome/etc.

name: Playful
description: something about the song is playful/playingly enthusiastic/etc.

name: Cocky
description: something about the song is self-confident in a bold/cheeky way

name: Exotic
description: something about the song is exotic: different in a fresh and unique way

name: Elegant
description: something about the song is elegant/subtle/high class/etc.

name: Sophisticated
description: it appears to you that this song would be listened to by sophisticated/rich/high class/etc. people

name: Underground
description: it appears to you that this song would be enjoyed by a specific subgroup of people only

name: Niche
description: it appears to you that this song would be enjoyed by very few people

name: Commercial
description: it appears to you that this song was produced to appeal to as much people as possible

name: Hit
description: it appears to you that this song would be listened to by masses (a hit, or in your opinion it was meant to be one)

name: Society
description: a collective of people with shared customs, laws, and organizations

name: Politics
description: the activities and strategies used to gain power or govern a group/society

name: Freedom
description: the ability to act, think, or speak without external constraints

name: History
description: the record of past events and how they shape the present

name: Activism
description: taking action to promote or resist change, often to support a cause

name: Rebelling
description: opposing authority or norms, often with the intent to change them

name: Bravery
description: acting courageously despite fear or danger

name: Bravado
description: displaying confidence or boldness, often exaggerated or superficial

name: YOLO
description: living recklessly or spontaneously because life is short

name: Heroism
description: selfless courage in the face of danger for the greater good

name: War
description: violent conflict between groups or nations, often for power or resources

name: Imperialism
description: extending power over other regions through force or influence

name: Power
description: the ability to control, influence, or command others

name: Deceit
description: intentionally misleading someone for personal gain

name: Conspiracy
description: a secret plan by a group to achieve a deceptive or illegal goal

name: Corruption
description: using power for personal benefit, betraying trust

name: Oppression
description: prolonged and unjust control over others

name: Fame
description: widespread recognition, often admired or envied

name: Beauty
description: qualities that please the senses or inspire admiration

name: Money
description: a medium of exchange, often a source of power and stress

name: Luxury
description: indulgence in costly, comfortable, or pleasurable things

name: Flexing
description: showing off material possessions or accomplishments

name: Passion
description: intense enthusiasm or love for something

name: Ambition
description: striving to achieve goals or success with determination

name: Motivation
description: the internal drive to pursue goals or take action

name: PersonalDev
description: improving oneself mentally, emotionally, or physically

name: Resilience
description: the ability to recover quickly from setbacks or difficulties

name: Endurance
description: the ability to keep doing something difficult or unpleasant for a long time

name: Fulfilment
description: feeling satisfied and complete after achieving something meaningful

name: Career
description: a professional journey often tied to one's purpose and livelihood

name: Knowledge
description: information and understanding gained through learning

name: Wisdom
description: applying knowledge and experience with insight and good judgment

name: Education
description: the process of gaining knowledge, skills, and understanding

name: SchoolLife
description: the experiences, lessons, and social aspects of attending school

name: Mischief
description: playful or harmless troublemaking, often for fun

name: PeerPressure
description: the influence of peers to conform to their expectations or behaviours

name: Nonconformity
description: refusing to follow societal norms or expectations

name: Competition
description: striving to outperform others in pursuit of a goal

name: Conflict
description: a serious disagreement or clash of interests

name: Argument
description: a verbal exchange of opposing views

name: Confrontation
description: direct opposition or challenge, often aggressive

name: Triumph
description: achieving victory or success after effort or struggle

name: Surrender
description: giving up or yielding to a stronger force or opponent

name: Failure
description: not achieving a desired goal, often accompanied by disappointment

name: Consolation
description: something that makes someone who is sad or disappointed feel better

name: Sports
description: physical contests for recreation, competition, or teamwork

name: Deprivation
description: lacking essential needs or comforts

name: Poverty
description: living with insufficient resources to meet basic needs

name: Tragedy
description: a deeply distressing event, often causing loss or suffering

name: Crime
description: actions that break the law and harm society or individuals

name: Violence
description: using physical force to harm or intimidate others

name: Discrimination
description: unfair treatment based on identity or characteristics

name: Inequality
description: an imbalance in rights, opportunities, or resources

name: Intoxication
description: impaired judgment or behaviour due to substances

name: Addiction
description: dependence on a substance or behaviour, despite negative consequences

name: Alcohol
description: a substance consumed for relaxation or escape, often overused

name: Drugs
description: substances that alter mental or physical states, with varying effects

name: Abstinence
description: deliberately avoiding certain pleasures or indulgences

name: Overcoming
description: successfully defeating challenges or obstacles

name: Sacrifice
description: giving up something valuable for a greater purpose

name: Religion
description: belief systems centred around spirituality and moral values

name: Prayer
description: communicating with a higher power, often for guidance or gratitude

name: Monasticism
description: teaching wisdom (and a way of life focused on simplicity, spirituality, and discipline)

name: Mysticism
description: seeking a deep spiritual connection beyond rational understanding

name: Traditionalism
description: valuing long-standing customs and practices over change

name: Nationalism
description: devotion to one's country, often placing it above others

name: Leadership
description: guiding and inspiring others towards a shared goal

name: Escapism
description: avoiding reality by indulging in fantasies or distractions

name: Inspiration
description: being mentally stimulated to create or act

name: Hedonism
description: prioritizing pleasure and avoiding pain as life's primary goal

name: Decadence
description: excessive indulgence in luxury, often leading to moral decline

name: Misanthropy
description: disliking or mistrusting humanity

name: Nihilism

name: Stoicism
description: enduring hardship calmly, focusing on reason and self-control

name: WorldView
description: the lens through which one interprets and understands life

name: Disillusionment
description: frustratingly realizing something isn't what you once believed

name: Redemption
description: seeking or achieving forgiveness, often after wrongdoing

name: Cosmopolitan
description: embracing a diverse and global perspective

name: CityLife
description: the fast-paced lifestyle of urban environments

name: ConcreteJungle
description: a metaphor for the bustling, chaotic structure of cities

name: Consumerism
description: valuing the acquisition of goods, often excessively

name: Environmentalism
description: advocating for the preservation of nature and sustainability

name: Science
description: the pursuit of knowledge about the natural world through evidence

name: Humankind
description: the collective human species, often reflecting shared struggles

name: Progressivism
description: advocating for change and advancement in society

name: Sexuality
description: exploring and expressing one's sexual identity and preferences

name: Gender
description: societal roles and identities related to being male, female, or beyond

name: LGBTQ
description: a spectrum of identities encompassing sexual and gender diversity

name: Feminism
description: advocating for equality between genders, especially for women

name: Futurism
description: imagining or promoting progress in technology and society

name: Cosmos
description: the universe as a vast, ordered system

name: Fantasy
description: imagining worlds or scenarios beyond reality

name: SciFi
description: exploring futuristic or speculative ideas, often grounded in science

name: Apocalypse
description: the end of the world, often marked by catastrophe

name: Animals
description: non-human creatures, often evoking companionship or curiosity

name: Youth
description: the early stages of life, full of energy and potential

name: Childhood
description: a time of innocence, wonder, and growth

name: Innocence
description: purity of mind or actions, untouched by experience or harm

name: Carefree
description: living without concern or burden, often associated with youth

name: Teenage
description: a phase of self-discovery and grappling with identity

name: Friendship
description: a bond of trust and affection with someone outside the family

name: Family
description: a group of people connected by blood, love, or shared experiences

name: Siblinghood
description: the unique relationship between brothers and sisters

name: Adulthood
description: the phase of maturity, responsibility, independence, and self-sufficiency

name: Parenthood
description: raising and nurturing children, often with sacrifices

name: Lifecycle
description: the stages of existence from birth to death

name: Legacy
description: what one leaves behind for others after they're gone

name: Health
description: the state of physical, mental, and emotional well-being

name: Healing
description: the process of recovering from physical or emotional pain

name: Death
description: the end of life, often evoking fear, grief, or reflection

name: MentalIllness
description: struggles related to mental health, such as anxiety or depression

name: Psychosis
description: losing touch with reality, often due to mental illness

name: Madness
description: extreme irrationality or instability in thoughts or behaviour

name: Suicide
description: the act of ending one's life, often tied to deep despair

name: Chance
description: the randomness of events or opportunities

name: Destiny
description: a predetermined course of events, often seen as inevitable

name: Miracle
description: an extraordinary event defying natural explanation

name: Decision
description: the act of making a choice, often shaping outcomes

name: Promises
description: commitments to do or not do something, based on trust

name: Lies
description: deliberate falsehoods meant to deceive others

name: Betrayal
description: breaking trust or loyalty, causing emotional harm

name: Adultery
description: betraying a partner through infidelity

name: Morality
description: dilemma what can be considered good and evil

name: Hypocrisy
description: acting against the values or beliefs one outwardly claims

name: Virtues
description: qualities considered morally good, such as kindness or honesty

name: Sins
description: actions considered immoral or offensive, often in a religious context

name: WarmUp
description: especially suited to be played BEFORE an event (e.g. while drinking w/ your friends before it)

name: Introductory
description: suited for starting an event/gig/etc.

name: Start
description: suited to be played at the beginning of the event

name: BuildUp
description: suited for increasing the energy on the dancefloor

name: PeakTime
description: could be played to a dancing crowd full of energy, among the ones to hit them first with

name: Sustain
description: could be played to a dancing crowd with high energy, but not the one hitting them first with

name: Release
description: could be played to a dancing crowd that's getting tired, chilling them down before hitting them again

name: PartyBreak
description: similar to release, but not as smooth energy decreaser, but more like a creative/drastic one

name: FinalPeak
description: could be played as a set closer, with a final blast of energy

name: FinalOutro
description: could be played as a set closer, but a slower, contemplative piece

name: AfterHours
description: could be played to a tired and sleepy crowd, bringing energy to them to keep partying

name: SlowDance

name: Infatuation
description: expresses/resembles the intense but maybe immature feeling of falling for someone

name: Angst
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of romantic frustration (no progress)

name: Neglect
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of not receiving attention from your love interest

name: Rejection
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of being rejected romantically

name: UnrequitedLove
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of 'love' towards someone, even though they've rejected you

name: Romance
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of requited romantic love

name: Romantic
description: not explicitly about romance, but musically suggestive of it (can be romantic background music e.g.)

name: Sensual
description: similar, but this one is mild and soothing and doesn't have to suggest romance, just positive feelings in general

name: Passionate
description: the opposite of sensual in energy: this expresses fiery romance

name: Sexy
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of lustful excitement IN YOU (subjective)

name: Erotic
description: explicitly contains lustful excitement (objective)

name: Sexual
description: explicitly contains sexual content

name: Dirty
description: explicitly contains sexual content, but in a vulgar fashion

name: Seduction
description: expresses/resembles the feelings and actions of wanting to seduce somebody

name: Flirty
description: expresses/resembles being flirtatious (not as intense and clear as 'seduction')

name: Affection
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of affectionate love (personal and deeper than physical attraction)

name: PlatonicLove
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of love without romance (e.g. for family, friends, etc.)

name: ForbiddenLove
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of love despite setbacks of other people, some situation, etc.

name: Separation
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of being separated from your loved one(s)

name: Heartbreak
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of love related sorrow

name: Fighting
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of arguing and fighting with your (past) love interest

name: BreakUp
description: expresses/resembles the feelings of the end of a romantic relationship

name: Kindred
description: feeling togetherness with a community

name: Intimacy
description: feeling really close to somebody, without feeling vulnerability

name: Vulnerability
description: the feeling of letting someone too close to you

name: Solitude
description: being alone in a neutral/positive, blissful sense

name: Loneliness
description: being alone in a negative sense

name: Grief
description: the sorrow felt when you lose somebody (they pass away)

name: Jealousy
description: negative feeling because sb has sth/sb that you want

name: Longing
description: wanting sb/sth wholeheartedly, but it's not (yet) painful (no setbacks)

name: Yearning
description: wishing for sb/sth that you cannot (easily) have - it can be painful

name: Hope
description: believing in something despite difficulties (it can happen, and I believe it will happen)

name: Faith
description: having trust in sb/sth, fully convinced (e.g.: she's going to do it, I know her)

name: Trust
description: trusting sb in the sense of directly believing them

name: Gratefulness
description: the feeling of being grateful to somebody or just general to God/life/etc.

name: Disappointment
description: when someone doesn't live up to your expectations, usually hurting you in the process

name: Delusion
description: being unable to realise your false beliefs

name: Temptation
description: when you're contemplating sth you know isn't moral

name: Injustice
description: what you feel when you experience sth that's not fair

name: Blame
description: when you think someone else should take responsibility for a wrong action

name: Revenge
description: when you cause misfortune to sb because of their perceived wrongdoings towards you

name: Rage
description: bursting in anger, in a visibly loud manner

name: Hatred
description: acting unreasonable towards sb because of some prejudice / negative history

name: Cruelty
description: acting unreasonable towards sb without apparent reason, just for enjoyment

name: Indifference
description: not showing any apparent care towards somebody or some situation in a sombre tone

name: Nonchalance
description: not caring about somebody or some situation in a confident tone

name: Forgiveness
description: what you feel when you('re willing to) forgive sb

name: Honesty
description: a feeling related to confession, telling the truth regardless, etc.

name: Empathy
description: sharing sb's negative feelings as if they were your own (compared to sympathy, which is just understanding them)

name: Compassion
description: willingness to help someone in a bad situation

name: Generosity
description: being mindful of the wellbeing of others, especially when it comes to providing

name: Humility
description: when you downplay yourself so others don't perceive you as vain or feel jealousy towards you

name: Pride
description: showing satisfaction because of your achievements

name: Vanity
description: feeling overly confident that you're better than others in some way

name: Insecurity
description: feeling less than others in a way and being nervous about it

name: Awkwardness
description: discomfort felt in the presence of others, often because of acting different to what you think others expect

name: Mellow
description: feeling warmed and relaxed, e.g. after drinking liqueur, spending time with your family, etc.

name: Joy
description: intensely expresses happiness

name: Sorrow
description: intensely expresses sadness

name: Melancholy
description: complex sadness, that's reflective in nature and indirect (unsure of cause(s)), and often persists

name: Depression
description: intensely expresses depression (acclimatised prolonged sadness and inertia)

name: Nostalgia
description: sentimentality (positive or ambivalent feelings) for the past, or more broadly just associations for memories

name: Wistfulness
description: feeling of sadness because you are thinking about something that's in the past

name: Burnout
description: extreme tiredness, usually caused by working too much or some mental issue

name: Resignation
description: feelings associated with giving up and accepting a bad situation

name: Regret
description: feeling of sadness about a mistake that you have made, and a wish that it could've been different

name: Guilt
description: feeling of worry or unhappiness caused by having done something morally wrong

name: Anger
description: visible and intense frustration (not to be confused with 'Angst', this isn't love related)

name: Agony
description: intensely expresses pain

name: Relief
description: a feeling of happiness that something unpleasant has not happened or has ended

name: Indulgence
description: allowing yourself to have something enjoyable that might not be good for you in excess

name: Greed
description: a very strong wish to continuously get more of something, especially food or money

name: Curiosity
description: hunger for knowledge

name: Confidence
description: trusting your abilities and acting as you don't doubt success

name: Self-reliance
description: when nobody can help you, or you just don't ask for help

name: Eagerness
description: being happy and enthusiastic, up for anything fun

name: Naivety
description: trusting people or things too easily without having experience or knowledge about them

name: Doubt
description: a feeling of not being certain about something

name: Anxiety
description: extensively prolonged fear which is often irrational and mentally destructive

name: Fear
description: a feeling of being frightened or worried by something dangerous, painful, or otherwise bad

name: Awe
description: a feeling of great respect sometimes mixed with fear or surprise
